result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Booking.com home page with Zurich entered as destination. Date picker is open, showing March 2026 and April 2026 calendars. Search button is visible on the right.
task_relevant_visible_text:
"Zurich"; "Check-in date — Check-out date"; "2 adults · 0 children · 1 room"; "Search"; "Calendar"; "March 2026"; "April 2026"; "Add flights"
selected_candidate:
The blue "Search" button at the right of the search bar.
constraint_evidence:
- Zurich destination: supported (visible in destination field).
- Stay starting January 20, 2026: not_visible (calendar shows March/April 2026, not January).
- Four nights: not_visible (no dates selected, no duration shown).
- Hotel in Zurich: supported (destination is Zurich; hotel search context implied by Booking.com).
- Rating 8.5 or above: not_visible (no results/rating shown).
- Free breakfast: not_visible (no amenity info shown).
- Sauna facilities: not_visible (no amenity info shown).
action_target:
Click the Search button to submit the Zurich hotel search.
success_signals:
Search is initiated and results page loads for Zurich.
failure_signals:
Click misses the Search button; date picker remains open without search submission; search parameters are incomplete.
uncertainty:
The date picker obscures the page and no check-in/check-out dates are selected, so it is unclear whether the intended January 20, 2026 start date was set elsewhere or if the search will proceed with defaults.

action.label: Click on BUTTON element with value 'Search'

observation.title: Booking.com | Official site | The best hotels, flights, car rentals & accommodations

args.query: Booking.com search initiated with incomplete date selection; date picker open and January 20 2026 not set; likely missed_constraint or early_terminated for hotel search filters

items.summary: The agent used broad browsing steps instead of applying the available search or filter controls.
items.fix_hint: Prefer task-specific search inputs and filters when the target can be narrowed directly.

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

args.expected_behavior: Select dates starting January 20, 2026 for four nights, then verify the resulting Zurich hotel listing satisfies rating 8.5+, free breakfast, and sauna before stopping.
args.actual_behavior: The agent clicked Search while the date picker was still open and no January 20, 2026 / four-night selection was visible; the final state only showed Zurich search results without evidence that the hard constraints were checked or satisfied.
args.regression_rule: Before ending a booking search task, explicitly verify each user constraint on the final results page; do not treat an unconfirmed search submission as success when required dates, amenities, or rating thresholds are not visible.

evidence.claim: The task required a Zurich hotel rated 8.5+ with free breakfast and sauna, starting January 20, 2026 for four nights.
At step 6, the high-detail screenshot shows the date picker open with March 2026 and April 2026 visible, not January 2026, while the Search button was clicked.
The same step detail marks January 20, 2026, four nights, rating 8.5+, free breakfast, and sauna as not visible, and notes the search parameters were incomplete.
The final step shows Zurich results with 5 properties found, but no visible evidence that the required dates or amenities were verified before stopping.
A similar validated precedent exists for missed constraints on search tasks.

suggested_followups.label: Check final results
suggested_followups.message: Inspect whether the Zurich listing actually includes rating 8.5+, free breakfast, and sauna.

suggested_followups.label: Verify dates
suggested_followups.message: Confirm the search used January 20, 2026 and a four-night stay.
